{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230205109B90FAFA7591BDB698FE"}"},"total":75},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7497196538226033470","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"NB，剧情稍微有些流水账，但问题不大，角色也蛮鲜活的，看的很舒服，就现阶段召唤的神会不会太多了，之后会不会再召唤一些类似魑魅魍魉的精怪啊，类似山海经之类的","text_exts":[{"e":74,"s":71,"text":"山海经","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%B1%B1%E6%B5%B7%E7%BB%8F&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774202710BDB698FE%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227497196538226033470%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227410609525335542808%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%B1%B1%E6%B5%B7%E7%BB%8F%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1745581012,"group_id":"7410609525335542808","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"吾乃面临深渊之人","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwLEzaYwcJphRg7HnHxoJi4=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788850&x-signature=sYCOa%2F9ZxoTl7Yne0kWtutXwoT0%3D","user_id":"70002344724","user_name":"临渊骑士"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"70002344724","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7410609525335542808","book_info":{"abstract":"【神话复苏+全球异常+异常末世+群像+克苏鲁+神明养成+亿点点神明娘化+大世界观+非无敌】
  “头顶的太阳想杀了我们，脚下的地球是个疯子，无边的黑夜想取代我们，就连死亡本身也要奴役我们。我还能怎么办？只能握紧手里的枪，告诉祂们这群怪物，人类还有最后一口气！！！”
——第五次异常战争，一位无名战士
  这是一个黑暗的时代，超越理性之物在大地上肆虐，无可言说的恐惧潜伏于城市的阴影中，旧日的幽魂在渴望着回归，人类竭尽全力，才换得一线生机……
  在这个混乱的世界里，在这个令人窒息的时代下，作为一位书店老板，陈籍首先要考虑的是——
谁来帮我交下这个月的房租啊！！！
  ——昆仑山阐教新任首席弟子、碧游宫截教荣誉副掌门、天宫御前护卫总管，十万天兵天将总教头、奥林匹斯山的贵客、屠龙者、与神接近者、苦行者、阿斯加德代理神王、与觉者同行之人、特诺奇蒂特兰的大神官、太阳船的副船长、混沌的使徒、乌鲁克的守护者、奈亚拉托提普的饲主、阿撒托斯的大祭司、圆桌骑士团荣耀骑士、异常毁灭者、五星好市民——陈籍如是说
（此书又名：《我的员工都是神明怎么办》、《我这真是普通书店》《我可没开挂，就是神缘有点好》）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2of8f882b1bb7b4e5ccb5f26466005aa49~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"墨水齿轮","author_id":"","book_id":"7410609525335542808","book_name":"给世界亿点点娘化神话震撼","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#485060","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1457人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":705,"name":"克苏鲁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=705&name=克苏鲁&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":841,"name":"群像","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=841&name=群像&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7410612382189224472","read_count":"1457","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"807110"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.9","serial_count":"329","tags":"都市高武,都市,末世,克苏鲁,群像","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e21cecb06ceb79afc2a222adcf289b17~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779386710&x-signature=U8VNHlk%2BfxI5AzLnWJEybAhQzBg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"602948121928787","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"184"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230205109B90FAFA7591BDB698FE"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":20200,"reply_count":3,"show_pv"
